title: Account-to-Account Transfer
description: The system shall allow the user to record a transfer of funds between two different accounts at a specific date/time. The system shall persist this as exactly two linked TransactionEntity rows (one debit, one credit) sharing a transfer_linked_id UUID. Both rows must have type=TRANSFER.
acceptance_criteria: User must select distinct source and destination accounts (same account rejected)
The entry UI provides a date/time picker pre-filled with the current system time
Source account balance decreases by the transfer amount as of the selected date
Destination account balance increases by the transfer amount as of the selected date
Two database rows are created sharing a non-null transfer_linked_id and the same user-selected date
Timeline shows both legs of the transfer linked visually
